inputs.label: Initial Pressure (P₁)
inputs.businessContext: Initial absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T₁)
inputs.businessContext: Initial absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

inputs.label: Final Pressure (P₂)
inputs.businessContext: Final absolute pressure of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

inputs.label: Final Temperature (T₂)
inputs.businessContext: Final absolute temperature of the gas. Enter 0 if unknown.

breakdown: Gay-Lussac Law: P₁/T₁ = P₂/T₂ (constant volume and mass)
Substitute known values and solve for the unknown.
If you are solving for P₁: P₁ = P₂ * T₁ / T₂
If solving for T₁: T₁ = P₁ * T₂ / P₂
If solving for P₂: P₂ = P₁ * T₂ / T₁
If solving for T₂: T₂ = P₂ * T₁ / P₁
